title: Data Model — ERD Reference
content: ## ERD-1: Core Entity Relationships
Table format optimized for AI agent parsing.
PK = Primary Key, FK = Foreign Key, UQ = Unique constraint.

All entities live in the `actions` schema. Most domain entities are tenant-scoped via `TenantId`. Exceptions: Language, Translation, TranslationValue are global (no TenantId, no RLS). TenantConfiguration has an Id that equals the tenant but does not implement ITenantEntity.
### Entity Index
| # | Entity | RLS | Description |
| E1 | ActionEntity | Yes | Core action record — tracks corrective/preventive actions |
| E2 | ActionEvidence | Yes | File attachments linked to an action (stored in blob storage) |
| E3 | ActionSourceLink | Yes | Links to originating records (incidents, audits, observations) |
| E4 | ActionStateHistory | Yes | Append-only log of state transitions |
| E5 | ActionAuditEvent | Yes | Append-only audit trail of all field changes |
| E6 | ActionConsultation | Yes | Consultation requests and responses for an action |
| E7 | RegulatoryDeadline | Yes | Regulatory/compliance deadlines attached to an action |
| E8 | WorkflowDefinition | Yes | Versioned workflow definitions (states + transitions) |
| E9 | WorkflowState | Yes | States within a workflow definition |
| E10 | WorkflowTransition | Yes | Valid transitions between workflow states |
| E11 | ComplianceProfile | Yes | Compliance configuration per action type |
| E12 | EscalationRule | Yes | Escalation rules for overdue actions |
| E13 | TenantSequence | Yes | Per-tenant sequential action number generator |
| E14 | Language | No | Supported languages (global, synced from Identity) |
| E15 | WorkflowDefinitionTranslation | Yes | Translations for workflow definition names/descriptions |
| E16 | WorkflowStateTranslation | Yes | Translations for workflow state names |
| E17 | ComplianceProfileTranslation | Yes | Translations for compliance profile names |
| E18 | EscalationRuleTranslation | Yes | Translations for escalation rule names |
| E19 | TenantConfiguration | No | FK anchor for all tenant-scoped tables (Id = Organization.Id from Identity) |
| E20 | DeadlineType | Yes | Tenant-level reference entity for regulatory deadline types |
| E21 | Translation | No | Global translation keys (no TenantId) |
| E22 | TranslationValue | No | Translation values per language (no TenantId) |
### Relationship Map
See diagram `DIAG-CORE-ENTITY-RELATIONSHIPS` for the visual relationship map (mermaid erDiagram).
### Relationship Detail Table
| Parent (1) | Child (M) | FK Column(s) | On Delete |
| E1 ActionEntity | E2 ActionEvidence | ActionId | Restrict |
| E1 ActionEntity | E3 ActionSourceLink | ActionId | Restrict |
| E1 ActionEntity | E4 ActionStateHistory | ActionId | Restrict |
| E1 ActionEntity | E5 ActionAuditEvent | ActionId | Restrict |
| E1 ActionEntity | E6 ActionConsultation | ActionId | Restrict |
| E1 ActionEntity | E7 RegulatoryDeadline | ActionId | Restrict |
| E1 ActionEntity | E1 ActionEntity (self) | ParentActionId | Set Null |
| E8 WorkflowDefinition | E9 WorkflowState | WorkflowDefinitionId | Cascade |
| E8 WorkflowDefinition | E10 WorkflowTransition | WorkflowDefinitionId | Cascade |
| E8 WorkflowDefinition | E15 WorkflowDefinitionTranslation | WorkflowDefinitionId | Cascade |
| E9 WorkflowState | E10 WorkflowTransition (from) | FromStateId | Restrict |
| E9 WorkflowState | E10 WorkflowTransition (to) | ToStateId | Restrict |
| E9 WorkflowState | E16 WorkflowStateTranslation | WorkflowStateId | Cascade |
| E11 ComplianceProfile | E17 ComplianceProfileTranslation | ComplianceProfileId | Cascade |
| E12 EscalationRule | E18 EscalationRuleTranslation | EscalationRuleId | Cascade |
| E8 WorkflowDefinition | E1 ActionEntity | WorkflowDefinitionId | Restrict |
| E9 WorkflowState | E1 ActionEntity (current state) | CurrentStateId | Restrict |
| E19 TenantConfiguration | (all tenant-scoped entities) | TenantId | Restrict |
| E20 DeadlineType | E7 RegulatoryDeadline | DeadlineTypeCode | Restrict |
| E21 Translation | E22 TranslationValue | TranslationId | Cascade |
| E14 Language | E22 TranslationValue | LanguageId | Restrict |
### Notable Columns
| Entity | Column | Type | Purpose |
| E1 ActionEntity | ActionNumber | VARCHAR | Per-tenant sequential: ACT-0001, ACT-0002 |
| E1 ActionEntity | TenantId | UUID | Tenant isolation — RLS enforced |
| E1 ActionEntity | Priority | INT | 1=Critical, 2=High, 3=Medium, 4=Low |
| E1 ActionEntity | DueDate | TIMESTAMPTZ | Target completion date |
| E1 ActionEntity | AssignedToId | UUID | User responsible for the action |
| E1 ActionEntity | ParentActionId | UUID NULL | Self-reference for sub-actions |
| E1 ActionEntity | StatusFlags | INT | Bitmask: Overdue, EscalationPending, etc. |
| E1 ActionEntity | RcaData | JSONB NULL | Root cause analysis structured data |
| E1 ActionEntity | Version | INT | Optimistic concurrency (ETag) |
| E4 ActionStateHistory | PreviousHash | VARCHAR | Reserved for hash chain integrity verification (Phase 2) |
| E5 ActionAuditEvent | Changes | JSONB | Field-level change tracking |
| E6 ActionConsultation | Status | VARCHAR | requested, responded, acknowledged, closed, expired |
| E8 WorkflowDefinition | Status | VARCHAR | Draft, Published |
| E8 WorkflowDefinition | Version | INT | Sequential version (0 = draft, 1+ = published) |
| E10 WorkflowTransition | GuardExpression | JSONB NULL | Guard conditions for transition eligibility |
| E13 TenantSequence | CurrentValue | BIGINT | Next action number for tenant |
### Key Indexes
| Entity | Index | Type | Purpose |
| E1 ActionEntity | (TenantId, ActionNumber) | BTREE UQ | Unique action number per tenant |
| E1 ActionEntity | (TenantId, CurrentStateId) | BTREE | Filter actions by state |
| E1 ActionEntity | (TenantId, AssignedToId) | BTREE | Actions assigned to user |
| E1 ActionEntity | (TenantId, DueDate) | BTREE | Overdue action queries |
| E4 ActionStateHistory | (ActionId, TransitionedAt) | BTREE | Chronological state history |
| E5 ActionAuditEvent | (ActionId, OccurredAt) | BTREE | Chronological audit trail |
| E8 WorkflowDefinition | (TenantId, Status) | BTREE | Published workflows lookup |
